textByHash.a7c3ce583dfc6e258744f7bd9e869fe1640aa9c1: Howdy there partner! Want to see my spinning plates? Or did ya want a holiday item back?
textByHash.a77004bf66e3976cb8dae6b41d1a2c6ca70074a8: That's right. There's a funny story behind them, their shipment was held up by thieves.
textByHash.ac6a16df08ce437f6e0613cf3c15f0c25b91f0a8: The crate was marked 'Dragon Plates'. Apparently they thought it was some kind of armour, when really it's just a plate with a dragon on it!
textByHash.daf8a5ca526ebeb938475e94b332158e0f71e913: Sure thing, let me just see what you're missing.
textByHash.a276549327ae78b6e2b808afd99664adf04e4916: Howdy there partner! You came at just the right time! I've got something for ya!
textByHash.9780b6bdb55fbeb0fd1ea8ced239effbf79a20f2: Well, I did some rooting around in my house and found this really neat hat.
textByHash.0c56200fc6c912425d762151de3e97feae9e1e88: A banana hat! Would you like it?
textByHash.fd5cc84eb6579b0146230ad2d7e063a24a66fe03: Looks like you've got no space for it, I'll hold onto it till you do. Just come to me to claim it.
textByHash.4375159404ac4cd0bf0a4d7ee514f64e12e1e372: So what else can I do for you partner? Want to see my spinning plates? Or did ya want a holiday item back?
textByHash.44e01796df103a124421cd5037dc446b1aad9f49: No problem amigo, come back to me to claim it if you change your mind.
textByHash.d512dabdacd955fc2baffd7c9983b4c6958799ae: Oh wow, you did it! Well done!
textByHash.42cd3cd317989944762c5ecffae927ef95768fc0: I was wondering when someone would complete this. I've been holding on to the reward for a while.
textByHash.c79465717b07740dcfe59c7cdeced538a651044f: The being who gave it to me was... rather strange.
textByHash.25c0bcf741e730ea3707a2e8ee3373267ece82e5: They didn't say. But they did give me some sage advice before they left.
textByHash.0c6015315d5af624586ab1d0baa2b5500941e15a: I don't remember exactly. Something about making the most of your time...
